salute.example: He raised his hand in a salute.

salvage.example: They tried to salvage goods from the wreck.
salvage.example_zh: 他們設法從船難中搶救貨物。

sanitation.example: Good sanitation prevents the spread of disease.
sanitation.example_zh: 良好的衛生能防止疾病散播。

savage.example: The savage storm tore down trees.
savage.example_zh: 猛烈的暴風雨吹倒了樹木。

scenic.example: We took the scenic route along the coast.
scenic.example_zh: 我們走沿海風景優美的路線。

scorn.example: She looked at the cheater with scorn.
scorn.example_zh: 她輕蔑地看著那個作弊的人。

scorn.example: He scorned their offer of help.
scorn.example_zh: 他不屑於他們提供的幫助。

scrape.example: He scraped the mud off his boots.
She got a scrape on her knee.

screwdriver.example: Use a screwdriver to fix the chair.

scroll.example: Scroll down to read the rest.
scroll.example_zh: 往下滑就能看完剩下的內容。

scroll.example: The old scroll showed a map.
scroll.example_zh: 那卷古老的卷軸上畫著一張地圖。

scrutiny.example: The plan came under close scrutiny.
scrutiny.example_zh: 這個計畫受到了嚴密的審查。

sculptor.example: The sculptor carved a statue from stone.
sculptor.example_zh: 雕塑家用石頭雕出一座雕像。

seagull-gull.example: A seagull flew over the harbor.

seduce.example: The smell of fresh bread seduced us inside.
seduce.example_zh: 新鮮麵包的香味誘使我們走了進去。

selective.example: She is selective about her friends.

serene.example: The lake was calm and serene.

sergeant.example: The sergeant trained the new soldiers.

serial.zh: 連續的、連載的、一連串的
serial.example: We watched a serial drama on TV.
serial.example_zh: 我們在電視上看了一齣連續劇。

sermon.example: The priest gave a moving sermon.
sermon.example_zh: 神父做了一場感人的佈道。

serving.example: Each serving has two hundred calories.

setback.example: The team suffered a setback but kept going.
setback.example_zh: 球隊遭遇挫折，但仍堅持下去。

shabby.example: He wore an old, shabby coat.
shabby.example_zh: 他穿著一件破舊的舊外套。

shaver.example_zh: 他買了一把電動刮鬍刀。

shortcoming.example_zh: 每個人都有自己的缺點。

shortsighted.example_zh: 那是個目光短淺的決定。

shred.example: There isn't a shred of evidence.

shriek.example: She let out a shriek of surprise.

shriek.example_zh: 孩子們高興得尖叫起來。

shrub.example: Small shrubs grew along the fence.

shuffle.zh: 洗（牌）、拖著腳走、重新排序
shuffle.example: He shuffled the cards before the game.
shuffle.example_zh: 他在牌局開始前先洗牌。

simplicity.example: I admire the simplicity of her design.

simultaneous.example_zh: 這兩件事是同時發生的。

skeptical.example: She was skeptical about his promise.
skeptical.example_zh: 她對他的承諾抱持懷疑。

skim.example_zh: 他快速瀏覽了這篇文章。

slang.example: Teens often use slang with friends.
slang.example_zh: 青少年和朋友常用俚語。

slash.example: Put a slash between the two words.
slash.example_zh: 在這兩個字之間加一條斜線。

slaughter.example: The farmer raises animals for slaughter.
Many people were slaughtered in the war.
slaughter.example_zh: 戰爭中許多人慘遭殺害。

slay.example: In the legend, the knight slew the dragon.
slay.example_zh: 在傳說中，騎士殺死了惡龍。

sloppy.example: His sloppy handwriting is hard to read.
sloppy.example_zh: 他潦草的字跡很難辨認。

slum.example: Many families live in the city slum.
slum.example_zh: 許多家庭住在城市的貧民窟裡。

slump.example: Sales took a sharp slump this year.
He slumped into the chair, exhausted.
slump.example_zh: 他筋疲力盡地癱坐在椅子上。

smuggle.example: They were caught trying to smuggle gold.
smuggle.example_zh: 他們企圖走私黃金時被逮。

sneaker.example: She wore comfortable sneakers to run.
sneaker.example_zh: 她穿著舒適的運動鞋去跑步。

sneaky.example: That was a sneaky way to win.
sneaky.example_zh: 那是個耍小手段取勝的方法。

snore.example: He snores loudly when he sleeps.

sociable.example: She is sociable and makes friends easily.
sociable.example_zh: 她善於交際，很容易交到朋友。

socialism.example: The class discussed the idea of socialism.
socialism.example_zh: 這堂課討論了社會主義的概念。

socialist.example: He holds socialist views on the economy.
socialist.example_zh: 他對經濟抱持社會主義的觀點。

socialize.example: We socialize with neighbors at the park.
socialize.example_zh: 我們在公園和鄰居們交流。

solemn.example: The ceremony was quiet and solemn.

solitary.example: He enjoys solitary walks in the woods.
solitary.example_zh: 他喜歡獨自在林間散步。

solitude.example: She found peace in the solitude of the hills.
solitude.example_zh: 她在山間的獨處中找到了平靜。

soothe.example: Soft music can soothe a crying baby.
soothe.example_zh: 輕柔的音樂能安撫哭鬧的嬰兒。
